org_constraint: The email must include a bulleted list.
new_constraint: Avoid using bullet points in the email.

Note: You mentioned including a bulleted list but also asked to avoid using bullet points, which is contradictory. To respect your instruction to avoid bullet points, I have created the list below using numbers instead of bullet markers.

Subject: Invitation to Our New Book Club! 📚

Hi everyone,

I was wondering if we could get together once a month to discuss books we are reading. I feel like this would be a wonderful way to connect with you all and share some great stories. We can rotate picking the next book, and the discussion can be as deep or as casual as you prefer.

Please review the proposed schedule and details below so we can finalize everything:

1.  We aim to meet every third Thursday of the month.
2.  The first meeting will take place next month.
3.  We will gather at [Insert Cafe Name] at 7:00 PM.
4.  Drinks and snacks will be provided.
5.  Please reply to confirm your availability for the first session.

I really hope we can make this happen and build some quality time into our schedules. Let me know if you have any questions or ideas on how to organize this further.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Note: You mentioned including a bulleted list but also asked to avoid using bullet points, which is contradictory. To respect your instruction to avoid bullet points, I have created the list below using numbers instead of bullet markers.

Subject: Invitation to Our New Book Club! 📚

Hi everyone,

I was wondering if we could get together once a month to discuss books we are reading. I feel like this would be a wonderful way to connect with you all and share some great stories. We can rotate picking the next book, and the discussion can be as deep or as casual as you prefer.

Please review the proposed schedule and details below so we can finalize everything:

1.  We aim to meet every third Thursday of the month.
2.  The first meeting will take place next month.
3.  We will gather at [Insert Cafe Name] at 7:00 PM.
4.  Drinks and snacks will be provided.
5.  Please reply to confirm your availability for the first session.

I really hope we can make this happen and build some quality time into our schedules. Let me know if you have any questions or ideas on how to organize this further.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
